name: @vanillagreen/pi-flightdeck
description_en: Optional Pi status shell for the flightdeck skill: owner-scoped mini-dashboard, pause banner, notifications, and /flightdeck focus/open integration for the Rust app.
description_zh: 面向飞行甲板技能的可选 Pi 状态外壳：所有者范围的迷你仪表板、暂停横幅、通知以及面向 Rust 应用的 /flightdeck focus/open 集成
